=📊 *Weekly roundup* — {{ DateTime.now().setZone('Asia/Kolkata').toFormat('EEE, dd LLL yyyy') }}

⚠️ Placeholder — weekly-rollup views not yet built.

When ready, this Monday digest should surface last-7d stats:
• New leads (count) vs prior week
• Proposals sent + win rate
• POs raised + ₹ value
• Customer invoices raised + collected
• Vendor payments made
• Commissionings completed
• Open escalations / SLA breaches
• Headline risks (cash, inventory, compliance)

Open: https://erp.shiroienergy.com/dashboard
